title: 4級 模擬テスト7 リスニング第1部 (Miami) 1

Nancy ( 1. know / 2. want / 3. more / 4. to ) about the healthy meals.

title: 4級 模擬テスト7 読解 1
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, healthy meals has become very popular in London. Since 1991, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 417 more events related to healthy meals.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
explanation: grade4-07-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト7 読解 7
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, smartphone apps has become very popular in Miami. Since 1997, many residents gather on weekends. Lisa, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 459 more events related to smartphone apps.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
explanation: grade4-07-reading-07: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト7 読解 8
prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
passage: Recently, volunteer work has become very popular in Toronto. Since 1998, many residents gather on weekends. Eve, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 466 more events related to volunteer work.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
explanation: grade4-07-reading-08: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト7 読解 9
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, school club activities has become very popular in Chicago. Since 1999, many residents gather on weekends. Rachel, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 473 more events related to school club activities.
explanation: grade4-07-reading-09: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト7 読解 10
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, community libraries has become very popular in Sydney. Since 2000, many residents gather on weekends. Ken, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 480 more events related to community libraries.
explanation: grade4-07-reading-10: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
